## Summary

What changed?

## Type

- [ ] Pattern
- [ ] Tool
- [ ] Benchmark
- [ ] Distribution standard
- [ ] Correction

## Checklist

- [ ] Clear stage: Produce / Package / Publish / Prove / Preserve
- [ ] Explains what it is
- [ ] Explains best-fit use cases
- [ ] Explains why it works
- [ ] Defines quality bar
- [ ] Notes tradeoffs or when not to use
- [ ] Includes evidence level or source context
